_fixture_meta.note: Synthetic LPS zone and R-code feature. NOT from a real DPLH WFS or council GIS dataset. Zone: R60 Residential (City of Vincent LPS2, illustrative). Covers an area larger than the test parcel so point-in-polygon resolution succeeds. GDA2020 EPSG:7844.

properties.scheme_name: City of Vincent Local Planning Scheme No. 2
properties.note: Synthetic R60 zoning record. City of Vincent LPS2 is a real instrument but this geometry, zone boundary, and R-code assignment are all illustrative. Real LPS zone data must be obtained from the council or DPLH WFS. R-code 'R60' is an illustrative test value — the actual R-code for any real parcel must be confirmed from approved source versions.
